2PM CBB: lowa State Vs. Cincinnati
Picks:
ISU -6.5 -115 5U (Dd)
ISU TTO 73.5 -131 3U (DK)
CIN TTU 67.5 -110 3U (Dk)
ISU 1H -3.5 -112 3U (FD)
2PM CBB: lowe State Vs. Cincinnati

Through the last three meetings between lowa State and Cincinnati,
the Cyclones have completely controlied this matchup, winning ail threa
gamos by o combined score of 225-185, an average game score of
78-61.3. That dominance hos not been accidento!, and it has corried
over into this season as lowa Stote enters this matchup playing at a for
higher level. lowa State comes in with on impressive 16-1 record, while
Cincinnati has underperformed to this point ot just 8-8. The gop
between these teams hos only widened os conference ploy hos
unfolded, ond this sets up as a game where lowa State is positioned to
dictate terms from the opening tip.

lowa State is scoring 74 PPG in conference play whde shooting 43%
from the field and an efficient 37% from three point range. They ore
generating this offense on 61 field goal attempts per game while cashing
in on 8.5 made threes per contest. Today, those numbers are set to rise
against a Cincinnati defense thot has struggled to contain efficient
offenses. In conference play, Cincinnati is surrendering 47% shooting
from the field and 39% from three point range, allowing 68 PPG despite
opponents taking just 54 field gool attempts and making 8 threes per
gamo. That defensive profile now faces an lowa State offense that plays
with higher volume and stronger perimeter efficiency, putting ISU in a
position to see cleaner looks and increased scoring output.

On the other side of the boll, Cincinnati is averoging just 67 PPG in
conference play while shooting 43% from the field on 69 field goal
attempts per game. That offense now runs directly into one of the most
disciplined defensive units in the conference. lowa State is surrendering
just 41% shooting trom the field in conference while allowing 56 ficld
goal attempts per game and holding opponents to 33% from three point
range. ISU Is giving up only 68.5 PPG overall while limiting opponents to
just 8 modo threes por game. That defonsive profile now matches up
against a Cincinnati offense shooting just 26% from three point range
ond cashing In on only 6 made threes per comest, placing Cincinnall
scoring firmly on the deciine.

While lowa State's record has been far superior to Cincinnati's all
season, early comparisons were more difficult prior to conference play
due to vastly different schedules. Now, through four conference games,
the separation has become clear. Cincinnati has gone just 1-3 in
conference play, while lowa State has gone 3-1, winning those games by
an averoge of 5.5 points per contest. With lowa State owning the
offensive edge, the defensive edge, and the stronger current form, this
motchup sets up for ISU to control the game early and maintain thot
advantage throughout.
